fato_historico: 1999: Air Fiji flight 121 crashes while en route to Nadi, Fiji, killing all 17 people on board.
energia_do_dia: Today, your intensity may surface like a gentle breeze over the ocean. Just as the winds change and even amidst the most challenging skies, there is a path toward finding peace. Consider how far you have traveled, honoring the resilience within your soul as you seek new horizons and emotional clarity throughout your beautiful journey.
frase_do_dia: Even in the deepest shadows, your inner light guides you toward safety.
significado_numero: Represents the pursuit of truth and a fresh start in life.
conselho: Trust your intuition and nurture your heart with kindness throughout this day.
